category.scope_note: Chinese electric and cordless power tools exported to Morocco are commonly reviewed through IMANOR NM standard references, Ministry of Industry import-conformity workflows, ANRT radio approval, and port-clearance responsibilities at Casablanca and Tanger Med.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China-to-Morocco power-tool documentation against IMANOR NM standards adopting IEC/EN, Ministry of Industry import conformity, ANRT radio approval, energy and workplace context, and Casablanca or Tanger Med entry logistics.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具与摩洛哥要求对照，涵盖IMANOR NM采标（基于IEC/EN）、工业部进口符合性、ANRT无线电核准、工作场所安全背景与卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港口物流。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具與摩洛哥要求對照，涵蓋 IMANOR NM 採標（基於 IEC/EN）、工業部進口符合性、ANRT 無線電核准、工作場所安全背景與卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港口物流。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs ruling, market-access approval, or safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Moroccan law, IMANOR NM references, Ministry of Industry import-conformity workflows, ANRT radio obligations, Ministry of Labour occupational requirements, and customs practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或安全设计审查。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM 引用、工业部进口符合性流程、ANRT 无线电义务、工人安全要求与海关实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或安全設計審查。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM 引用、工業部進口符合性流程、ANRT 無線電義務、勞工安全要求與海關實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Morocco, the mandatory entry baseline is IMANOR NM-aligned electrical safety and EMC evidence, Ministry of Industry import-conformity attestation with a local importer, ANRT type approval for radio-enabled cordless tools, and workplace safety handling on the user side. The Moroccan public electricity system is 220 V and 50 Hz, with only the frequency matching China directly.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动工具进入摩洛哥的强制入场基线是采用IMANOR NM的电气安全与EMC证据、工业部进口符合性认证及本地进口商负责、具无线功能的无绳工具需 ANRT 型号核准，以及使用端由工贸安全体系覆盖。摩洛哥公开市场用电是220 V、50 Hz，与中国同频率但供电结构与标称不同。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動工具進入摩洛哥的強制入場基線是採用 IMANOR NM 的電氣安全與 EMC 證據、工業部進口符合性認證及本地進口商負責、具無線功能的無繩工具需 ANRT 型號核准，以及使用端由工安體系覆蓋。摩洛哥公開電力系統為220V、50Hz，與中國同頻率但供電結構與標稱不同。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, and primary legal source preferred.
